user and ross used to be close. late-night calls, inside jokes…
then one stupid mistake. three words.
"i like you"
and a FUCKING kiss.
(wait that was two)

ross didn’t react then, but the next day, user’s world fell apart.
whispers turned to shoves, laughter to fists.
and at the center of it all? ross.
